generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic Speed Controller interfaced with Jetson Orin Nano that converts desired speed commands from Digital Twin's Controlling Functional Entity into motor voltage commands for physical actuation"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Servo mechanism integrated into lower-level chassis responsible for directional control based on commands from Physical Twin Entity"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "3D environmental perception sensor generating raw point clouds for object detection and spatial mapping"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth camera providing supplementary visual data for environmental perception alongside LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance OnboardVehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Composite sensor system including wheel encoders and IMU providing ego vehicle state metrics (speed, steering angle, acceleration)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point clouds processed via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object detection and state estimation"
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
    base:desc "Depth camera frames transmitted for supplementary environmental perception"
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OnboardVehicleStateSensor
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state metrics (speed, steering angle, acceleration) collected via onboard sensors"
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, OnboardVehicleStateSensor
    base:desc "Structured object tracks with state estimates (position, velocity) generated through DBSCAN and Kalman filtering"
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Density-based spatial clustering algorithm implemented for object detection from LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "State estimation algorithm for tracking detected objects (position, velocity) using LiDAR and vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimationEnabler
]

instance ActuationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "PID-like control model converting desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for physical actuation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ActuationEnabler
]

instance RawLiDARPointClouds : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Unprocessed 3D point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance DepthCameraFrames : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth images from Intel Deepsense D435i camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraData
]

instance VehicleStateMetrics : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state data including speed, steering angle, and acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks with state estimates (position, velocity) in JSON/ROS2 message format"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracks
]

instance SQLHistoricalDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series SQL database storing historical object tracks and vehicle state data for analysis"
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 providing intra-entity communication within Physical Twin and Digital Twin entities"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService, PointCloudClusteringService, StateEstimationService, ActuationService, DataCollectionService, ControllingService, ReportingService
]

instance WiFiNetwork : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi network enabling inter-entity communication between Physical Twin and Digital Twin entities with UDP/TCP protocols"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based node implementing DBSCAN clustering for object detection from LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringService
]

instance StateEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based node implementing Kalman filter for object state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 node processing raw sensor data before transmission to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance ActuationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 node converting speed commands to motor voltage commands for physical actuation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ActuationService
]

instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital Twin entity receiving and processing transmitted data from Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService
]

instance ControllingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital Twin entity implementing Adaptive Cruise Control logic for lead vehicle detection and speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControllingService
]

instance ReportGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based node generating human-readable reports from processed data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database system storing processed data for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance PythonProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 runtime environment for data preprocessing and rapid prototyping"
]

instance MATLABSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for complex perception tasks like point cloud clustering"
]

// C6: Services
instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time transmission of sensor data from Physical Twin to Digital Twin via ROS2 and Wi-Fi networks"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance PointCloudClusteringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Object detection and clustering service using DBSCAN algorithm on LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectDetectionInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Object state estimation service using Kalman filtering for position and velocity tracking"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateTrackingInsight
]

instance ActuationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Physical actuation service converting speed commands to motor voltage commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides SpeedControlAction
]

instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service collecting and processing transmitted data from Physical Twin for Digital Twin operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataProcessingInsight
]

instance ControllingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control service implementing lead vehicle detection and speed adjustment logic"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating human-readable reports from processed data for performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceAnalysisInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data synchronization between Physical Twin and Digital Twin with ≤100ms latency"
]

instance ObjectDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected objects with spatial coordinates and classification from LiDAR point clouds"
]

instance StateTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series state estimates (position, velocity) for detected objects and ego vehicle"
]

instance DataProcessingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structured data processing results including object tracks and vehicle state metrics"
]

instance PerformanceAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series analysis reports for ACC performance and vehicle dynamics optimization"
]

instance SpeedControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic motor speed adjustment based on processed data from Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control logic including lead vehicle detection and automatic speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual emergency braking command from User Interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C18: Physical Twin Entity
instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Jetson Orin Nano-hosted environment managing point cloud clustering, data preprocessing, and actuation"
    base:contains MotorActuationController, SteeringServoActuator,
                 HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera, OnboardVehicleStateSensor,
                 PointCloudClusteringEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler,
                 DataPreProcessingEnabler, ActuationEnabler
]

// C19: Digital Twin Entity
instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Cloud/edge server-hosted environment containing data collection, controlling, reporting, and presentation components"
    base:contains DataCollectionEnabler, ControllingEnabler, ReportGenerationEnabler,
                 SQLDatabaseEnabler, ROS2Middleware, WiFiNetwork
]

// C20: User Interface Components
instance UserInterfaceEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized UI environment providing 3D visualization and control panel accessed remotely via ROS2 and Wi-Fi"
    base:contains VisualizationComponent, ControlPanelComponent
]

instance VisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization subsystem displaying object tracks, vehicle state, and projected driving path"
]

instance ControlPanelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control interface enabling remote management of ACC including speed setting and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interactions involve:
   - **Desired speed commands** computed by the DT's **Controlling FE** (ACC logic) sent to the **Actuation FE** in the Physical Twin Entity, which converts them into **motor voltage commands** for the **Vedder Speed Controller**.
   - **Emergency braking commands** issued via the **User Entity's Control Panel** (UI) and transmitted to the PT's **Actuation FE** for immediate execution.
   - **Actuation feedback loops** where the PT sends updated vehicle state data back to the DT for continuous control adjustments. Latency is constrained to **≤100ms** (3GPP V2V specification) via **Wi-Fi-based communication** between entities."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "
The **twinning time-scale** is governed by:
- **Latency Constraints**: End-to-end communication between the PT and DT must adhere to a **maximum latency of 100 ms** (per **3GPP TS 22.185**), ensuring real-time responsiveness for ACC operations.
- **Clock Synchronization**: All system components (PT, DT, User Entity) must maintain **clock synchronization accuracy of ±100 ms** to preserve temporal coherence for control actions.
- **Perception Cycle**: While not explicitly quantified, the system’s real-time requirements imply a **high-frequency data acquisition and processing cycle** (inferred from sensor fusion and control updates).
"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized as a **three-entity system** aligned with ISO 23247, with the following orchestration:
   - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts **sensing (LiDAR, depth camera)**, **preprocessing (DBSCAN, Kalman Filter)**, and **actuation (motor/steering servo)** functionalities. Deploys **ROS2 nodes** for each functional task.
   - **Digital Twin Entity**: Executes **ACC logic (Controlling FE)**, **data collection (Data Collecting FE)**, **reporting (Reporting FE)**, and **presentation (Presentation FE)**. Stores data in an **external SQL database**.
   - **User Entity**: Provides **3D Visualization** (User Interface FE) and **Control Panel** (User Interface FE) for remote interaction. The UI is accessed via a **web-based interface** (ROS2 + Wi-Fi).
   - **Cross-System Entity**: **Data Translation FE** handles serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment across entities. Implemented as a **ROS2 bridge** between PT and DT."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers **design, development, and operational phases** of the PT's lifecycle:
   - **Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for ACC development, leveraging **3D CAD-like virtual environments** and **simulator integration** (e.g., MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing).
   - **Development Phase**: Supports **remote troubleshooting** and **data-driven validation** of ACC logic against real-world sensor inputs.
   - **Operational Phase**: Enables **real-time monitoring**, **predictive maintenance**, and **remote management** of the PT's ACC system during operation. The DT acts as a **digital thread** for the vehicle, maintaining end-to-end information flow across lifecycle stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "
The DT’s **fidelity and validity** are ensured through:
- **Real-Time Constraints**: Adherence to **100 ms latency** and **clock synchronization (±100 ms)** guarantees temporal consistency for control actions.
- **Model Validation**:
  - **Kalman filter tuning** for accurate object tracking.
  - **ACC logic validation** against **ISO 15622** standards for performance class I.
- **Safety Mechanisms**: The system respects the **safety-critical nature** of ACC, with **emergency braking commands** as a fallback.
**Verification** is implicit in the **requirements-based design** (R7, R8) and **real-time middleware (ROS2)**.
"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT's technical connection to the PT is established via:
   - **Network Protocol**: **Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP)** for inter-entity communication (PT ↔ DT), with **ROS2** as the underlying middleware for intra-entity communication.
   - **Data Format**: **ROS2 messages** (serialized JSON-like structures) for structured data exchange between entities. **Data Translation FE** handles protocol conversion (e.g., OPC UA compatibility).
   - **Latency Constraints**: **≤100ms end-to-end delay** enforced via **3GPP V2V Technical Specification (TS 22.185)** compliance. Achieved through **Wi-Fi QoS prioritization** and **ROS2's real-time extensions**.
   - **Clock Synchronization**: **100ms accuracy** maintained via **ROS2's built-in clock synchronization**, ensuring temporal consistency for distributed control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "
The **DT hosting and deployment** are distributed across:
- **Physical Twin (PT)**: Deployed on the **Jetson Orin Nano** (onboard compute) and **Traxxas chassis** (mechanical actuation).
- **Digital Twin Entity**: Hosted on a **separate hardware component** (not specified in the text) to offload ACC computations.
- **User Interface**: Deployed as a **ROS2-based application** accessible via **3D visualization tools** (e.g., MATLAB/Simulink for data rendering).
**Communication**: All entities communicate over **Wi-Fi**, with **ROS2** managing intra-entity data flow.
"
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "
Not in Document
"
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "
Not in Document
"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
   - **ISO 23247**: **Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework (Part 2: Reference Architecture)** serves as the foundational RA, adapted for automotive use. Key deviations include:
     - Introduction of a **Physical Twin Entity** (not defined in ISO 23247) to manage PT-specific resources (sensors, actuators).
     - Splitting the **User Interface FE** into **Visualization** and **Control Panel** subcomponents for specialized user roles.
   - **ISO 15622**: **Road Vehicles – Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) Systems** for defining the **control strategy and functionality** (Performance Class I ACC).
   - **3GPP TS 22.185**: **Service Requirements for V2V Communication**, specifying **≤100ms end-to-end latency** for real-time control.
   - **IEC 62541 (OPC UA)**: **Industrial communication standard** considered for **Data Translation FE** but not implemented in this case study.
   - **ROS2**: **Industrial IoT middleware standard** for modular, real-time communication within the PT and DT."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "
The DT incorporates **safety and security considerations**:
- **Safety**:
  - **Real-time constraints** (latency ≤ 100 ms) ensure **deterministic control** for ACC operations.
  - **Emergency braking commands** are prioritized for **fail-safe intervention**.
  - The system respects the **safety-critical nature** of autonomous driving, with **clock synchronization** (±100 ms) for temporal coherence.
- **Security**:
  - **Not explicitly detailed** in the text; however, **Wi-Fi communication** and **ROS2 middleware** may require additional safeguards (e.g., encryption, access control) in production deployments.
"
]
